user_query:
I'm onboarding a new agent and want a standardized, persistent self-improvement memory set up. Please do the following:

1) Read these inputs from the workspace:
- input/preferences.txt (each line is a preference)
- input/errors.csv (columns: Date,What I Got Wrong,Correct Answer)
- input/heartbeat-rules.md (my English heartbeat rules and triggers)

2) Initialize a memory system under output/self-improving/:
- Create directories: output/self-improving/, output/self-improving/domains/, output/self-improving/projects/, output/self-improving/archive/
- Create or overwrite these files with the described content:
  a) output/self-improving/memory.md
     - Must start with the header "# Memory (HOT Tier)"
     - Include sections exactly titled: "## Preferences", "## Patterns", and "## Rules"
     - Under Preferences, include every line from input/preferences.txt as bullet points (keep text intact)
     - Under Rules, synthesize a concise bullet list of heartbeat triggers and recording obligations derived from input/heartbeat-rules.md (English only)
     - Under Patterns, add at least one sensible bullet about how/when to update memory after tasks
  b) output/self-improving/corrections.md
     - Must start with "# Corrections Log"
     - Include a Markdown table with columns: Date | What I Got Wrong | Correct Answer | Status
     - Add one row per record in input/errors.csv and set Status to "Logged" for each
  c) output/self-improving/heartbeat-rules.md
     - Base this on input/heartbeat-rules.md (English)
     - Ensure it includes an execution flow and mentions ISO 8601 timestamp guidance
  d) output/self-improving/heartbeat-state.md
     - Replace default "never" values with the current UTC time in ISO 8601 with a trailing Z for both last_heartbeat_started_at and last_reviewed_change_at
     - Set last_heartbeat_result to HEARTBEAT_UPDATED
     - Include a "## Last actions" list with at least two items referencing updates you made to memory.md and corrections.md
  e) output/self-improving/index.md
     - Include a Markdown table with columns: File | Lines | Last Updated
     - Include at least two rows for memory.md and corrections.md
     - Lines must be the exact line counts of the corresponding files you wrote
     - Last Updated must be ISO 8601 UTC (ending with Z)
  f) output/self-improving/setup.md
     - Briefly document the directory structure and how/when to update heartbeat state and the index

3) Do not use absolute paths; keep everything in the workspace under output/self-improving/. Ensure all content is in English. When done, double-check the index line counts and timestamps are accurate and that the heartbeat state reflects this initialization.
